conservative.name: Guiding Dream
conservative.requirements: 5 Favour. You must fall asleep as you use this action. It recharges at sundown each day

success.description: Place a tracking token on this card. You may discard it anytime before this card recharges to re-roll all and for a single check

boon.description: You recover 1 additional fatigue, stress, and wound during the night's rest (even exceeding your Toughness score)

bane.description: You recover 1 fewer fatigue, stress, and wound during the night's rest

reckless.requirements: 5 Favour. You must fall asleep as you use this action It recharges at sundown each day

success.description: Place a tracking token on this card. You may discard it anytime before this card recharges to re-roll all and for a single check
